title: A Fire Has Been Arranged
writer: H. Fowler Mear, James A. Carter, Michael Barringer
actors: Bud Flanagan, Chesney Allen, Mary Lawson
plot: A pair of friends robs from a jewelry shop, and buries their loot in a field out in the country before they get caught. They spend ten years in prison, and when they're let out they go back to the burial ground, only to find out t...
